ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "stora_number" TEXT /* Storage number associated with the route */,
  "ahgt" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the absolute height above ground is true */,
  "airway_level" INTEGER /* Level of airway (high, low, or both) */,
  "aircraft_group" INTEGER /* Group of aircraft permitted to use the route */,
  "al_ro_air_group" INTEGER /* Group of aircraft permitted to use the alternate route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the route */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* Origin airport code */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route information was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., active, inactive, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_aircraft_group FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_group") REFERENCES aircraft_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_airway_level FOREIGN KEY ("airway_level") REFERENCES airway_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft group */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of aircraft in the group (in knots) */,
  "max_altitude" REAL /* Maximum altitude of aircraft in the group (in feet or meters) */,
  "min_altitude" REAL /* Minimum altitude of aircraft in the group (in feet or meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airway_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airway level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the airway level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the airway level */,
  "min_altitude" REAL /* Minimum altitude for the airway level (in feet or meters) */,
  "max_altitude" REAL /* Maximum altitude for the airway level (in feet or meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_numbers" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for storage numbers */,
  "storage_number" TEXT /* The actual storage number indicating route information */,
  "storage_description" TEXT /* Description of the storage number */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the storage number was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absolute_heights" (
  "height_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for height records */,
  "height_value" REAL /* Height value above ground level */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for height (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  "min_height_value" REAL /* Minimum height value above ground level */,
  "max_height_value" REAL /* Maximum height value above ground level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the height information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for compliance records */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being checked for compliance */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft being checked */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the aircraft is compliant with the route */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the compliance check */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the check */,
  "next_check_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_compliance_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_compliance_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., air traffic controller, safety inspector) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
